home.hero_title: The grooming replacement platform in Quebec
home.hero_subtitle: Salons post their replacement needs. Independent groomers apply for free.
home.feature_shifts_desc: Find urgent or planned replacement shifts in your area. Salons pay to post, groomers apply for free.
home.feature_jobs_desc: Apply to job offers from grooming salons across Quebec.
home.feature_schools_desc: Discover grooming schools and training programs across Quebec.
home.step1_desc: The salon creates a replacement or job listing and publishes it.
home.step2_desc: The groomer sees the listing and applies in one click, for free.
home.step3_desc: The salon accepts a candidate. Both parties receive an email confirmation.
home.groomers_section_subtitle: Receive applications from qualified professionals in your area, within minutes.

meta.title: Pricing — Tout Toilettage
meta.description: Choose the right plan for your salon. One credit to publish a replacement shift.

hero.title: A missed replacement costs a full day of revenue.
hero.subtitle: Tout Toilettage helps you find a groomer quickly through a specialized platform.
hero.taxNote: All prices in CAD, before taxes (GST 5% + QST 9.975%)

credits.title: How credits work
credits.step1_desc: Create your listing in 30 seconds and choose when to publish it.
credits.step2_desc: One credit is deducted at publishing, regardless of duration or applications.
credits.step3_desc: Qualified groomers in your area see and apply to your listing.
credits.explanation: One credit = one replacement shift or job post.

decouverte.title: Discovery Offer
decouverte.subtitle: Try the platform
decouverte.description: Publish up to 3 replacements to discover the quality of candidates in your region.
decouverte.valueNote: One saved replacement can represent $300–$700 in revenue.

pricing.riskReduction: If you receive no applications, your credit is not used.

features.openSlots: Post last-minute openings for pet owner clients

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.a1: One credit = one shift or job post. Each posting costs 1 credit, regardless of duration or number of applicants received.
faq.a2: Subscription credits roll over for up to 3 months. Découverte Pack credits are valid for 12 months.
faq.a3: Yes, at any time. Upgrades take effect immediately. Downgrades take effect at the next billing cycle.
faq.q4: How many applications will I receive?
faq.a4: Most replacements receive 3–10 applications within 24 hours, depending on your region and the type of position.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1_body: ToutToilettage is a bilingual platform dedicated to the professional pet grooming industry in Quebec, operated as a S.E.N.C. (general partnership) in Quebec, Canada.
privacy.s2_payment: processed by Stripe (we do not store your card information)
privacy.s4_body1: We never sell your personal information.
privacy.s4_body2: We only share with: Stripe (payments), Resend (emails), Vercel (hosting).
privacy.s4_body3: All our subcontractors are bound by confidentiality obligations.
privacy.s5_body1: Your data is retained as long as your account is active.
privacy.s5_body2: You may request deletion of your account at any time.
privacy.s6_intro: Under Quebec's Law 25, you have the right to:
privacy.s7_body: In accordance with Law 25, the person responsible for the protection of personal information is the management of ToutToilettage.
privacy.s8_body: We use SSL encryption, hashed passwords (bcrypt), and restricted access to personal data.
privacy.s9_body: We will notify you by email of any significant changes to this policy.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.s1_body: By using ToutToilettage, you agree to these terms of service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use the platform.
terms.s2_body: ToutToilettage is a platform connecting grooming salons with professional groomers in Quebec. We facilitate the posting of replacement shifts, job offers, and application management.
terms.s3_item1: You must be 18 years or older to create an account
terms.s3_item2: You are responsible for the confidentiality of your account and password
terms.s3_item3: The information you provide must be accurate and up to date
terms.s4_item1: Professional use only — the platform is reserved for the grooming industry
terms.s4_item2: Fake profiles, false information, or misleading content are prohibited
terms.s4_item3: Harassment, abusive, or discriminatory behavior is prohibited
terms.s5_item2: Fees are displayed before taxes (GST 5% + QST 9.975%)
terms.s5_item3: Subscriptions renew automatically at each billing cycle
terms.s6_item1: Subscriptions: cancellation available at any time, effective at the end of the current billing cycle
terms.s7_body: ToutToilettage is a matchmaking platform. We are not responsible for agreements made between salons and groomers, nor for the quality of services provided between parties.
terms.s8_body: The content, design, code, and ToutToilettage brand are the exclusive property of ToutToilettage S.E.N.C. Any reproduction without authorization is prohibited.
terms.s9_body: These terms are governed by the laws of the Province of Quebec and Canada. Any dispute will be submitted to the competent courts of the district of Montreal.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.s1_body: ToutToilettage only uses cookies that are essential to the operation of the platform. We do not use advertising or third-party tracking cookies.
cookies.s2_body: The following cookies are strictly necessary for the site to function:
cookies.s2_locale: remembers your language choice (French or English)
cookies.s3_body: We do not use any advertising, analytics, or third-party tracking cookies. In accordance with Quebec's Law 25, no additional consent is required for essential cookies.
